name: AI Product Recommendation Engine
description: Generate personalized product recommendations for customers based on purchase history and browsing behavior using AI. Sends recommendations via email.
author: platform

config.sql: SELECT c.email, c.first_name, array_agg(p.name) AS purchased_products, array_agg(p.category) AS categories FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id JOIN products p ON p.id = ANY(o.product_ids) WHERE c.marketing_opt_in = true GROUP BY c.email, c.first_name LIMIT 100

config.subject: {{$item.value.first_name}}, we picked these just for you
